rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §1.004, which governs display of the national motto in schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A public elementary or secondary school or an institution of higher education as defined by Section 61.003 must display in a conspicuous place in each building of the school or institution a durable poster or framed copy of the United States national motto, "In God We Trust,"
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses school display of the national motto and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
